lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with only minor signs of use. The interior is clean and shows minimal wear. All mechanical systems are fully functional and perform reliably.
Mint condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are free of any scratches, dents, or imperfections. The interior shows no signs of wear and remains in original condition. All mechanical systems are functioning as new.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine, and there are absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in like-new condition, with the upholstery and trim showing no signs of wear. All mechanical systems and electronic features operate perfectly, and the engine bay is spotless. This car represents a rare opportunity for a buyer seeking a vehicle that is indistinguishable from a brand-new model.

Get ready to own a true gem! This car is in absolute mint condition, looking and feeling just like it did the day it left the showroom. With a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that's been meticulously cared for, it's a rare find that offers a like-new driving experience. Don't miss out on this impeccably maintained beauty!

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs. The engine is difficult to start and idles roughly, indicating potential internal issues, and the transmission slips between gears. Externally, the body shows extensive rust, particularly around the wheel wells, along with several noticeable dents and faded paint. The interior has seen better days, with ripped seating, a cracked dashboard, and non-functional electronics. This car is being sold as-is and is recommended only for those looking for a dedicated project car or a source for parts.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original luster. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, this motorcar represents a premier acquisition for the connoisseur who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it's in absolutely stunning, showroom-ready condition! I've babied this car since day one, and it literally looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. I'm so sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a peerless example of precision engineering. This specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated flat-six mated to a crisp six-speed manual transaxle. The chassis remains factory-rigid, featuring a meticulously maintained multi-link rear suspension and upgraded Bilstein dampers for optimal turn-in response. Power is delivered through a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring linear torque distribution across the rear axle. The engine bay is immaculate, showcasing pristine forged internals and a carbon-fiber intake plenum. Every bushing, seal, and fluid line is in concours-level condition, offering a visceral driving experience free of NVH issues. This is a collector-grade machine for the discerning driver who values mechanical purity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Flawless paint and interior. Fully serviced. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom condition with absolutely zero compromises. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like factory finish, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings. Every panel gap is perfectly aligned, and the alloy wheels are completely free of curb rash, wrapped in premium tires with near-full tread. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the hand-stitched leather seats are supple with no bolster wear, and the original carpets have been protected by floor mats since day one. All electronic components, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity surround sound system, function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy at authorized service centers—full, meticulous service history documentation is included. The engine bay is concours-level clean, and the drive is as tight, quiet, and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a flawless example of this model.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in pristine, showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, offering an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. With impeccable aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity, it represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and presented in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen features a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new, a testament to its fastidious ownership history. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a vehicle of investment-grade quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to secure a truly pristine automotive asset.

Hey everyone! 👋 Up for grabs is my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one—always garaged and kept spotless. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that 'new car' feel. If you’re looking for something that’s been loved and looked after, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is an exceptional, collector-grade E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six. This unit remains in concours-level condition, boasting linear power delivery and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline facilitated by six individual throttle bodies. Mechanically, the VANOS system has been professionally bulletproofed, and the rear subframe—a critical structural point—has been reinforced with precision-welded plates to ensure maximum torsional rigidity. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw engagement, sending power through a factory-spec variable M differential lock. The suspension geometry remains stock and tight, with zero bushing deflection or damping degradation. Finished in a flawless exterior with a pristine interior, this example represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance records included. Runs like new.

Step into automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained masterpiece. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, having been strictly garage-kept and protected from the elements since day one. The exterior finish retains its deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero imperfections, chips, or swirls, while the interior remains a pristine time capsule—the premium leather smells factory-fresh and shows no signs of bolster wear or aging. Every mechanical component has been serviced ahead of schedule by certified technicians, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from the day it left the lot. Complete with a full documented service history, original manuals, and both sets of keys, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example of this model.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in showroom condition and maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a meticulous ownership history and a commitment to mechanical integrity. It represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example of this model. Every surface and component adheres to original factory specifications, ensuring a peerless driving experience and long-term value.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and a pristine mechanical profile. For the discerning driver who demands unparalleled quality, this offering represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it stands as a testament to superior automotive stewardship.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely stunning shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for something that's practically brand new without that dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

Offering a pristine F87 M2 Competition, engineered for the purist. This example features the S55 3.0L twin-turbocharged inline-six, delivering a robust torque curve and exceptional thermal management. The chassis exhibits factory-spec rigidity, paired with an Active M Differential for optimal power delivery and lateral grip. The dual-clutch transmission provides lightning-fast shifts, while the braking system retains maximum bite with zero fade. Meticulously maintained with full service records, this vehicle represents a benchmark in mechanical preservation and high-performance dynamics.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained in showroom condition since the day it rolled off the lot. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior still retains that fresh factory scent, featuring pristine leather and an untouched dashboard. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, and the engine runs as silently and smoothly as it did on day one. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of strictly climate-controlled garage storage, this car represents the absolute pinnacle of its model year. No scratches, no dents, and a completely clean title—this is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new machine.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. Meticulously inspected and maintained to meet the most exacting standards, this motorcar offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. We invite you to acquire a specimen of rare distinction.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that transcends the typical secondary market offering. This unit showcases a flawless aesthetic profile and a meticulously preserved interior, reflecting a history of rigorous care and climate-controlled storage. Engineered for the discerning driver who demands mechanical perfection and aesthetic purity, this motorcar represents a premier investment in automotive excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she's a total beauty! This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been meticulously cared for, always kept in the garage, and is just waiting for a new owner who will love it as much as I have. You won't find a single flaw on this one. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This example boasts a pristine chassis with zero subframe fatigue and a factory-spec Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox. The mechanical integrity is superlative, featuring a recently serviced limited-slip differential and a suspension geometry that remains tight and responsive. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon, the paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the interior demonstrates zero bolster wear or pixel degradation. A mechanically synchronized masterpiece for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. No exterior or interior wear. Low mileage. Full service records. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, presented in museum-quality condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and fragrant, showing no signs of bolster wear or sun fading. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with every service documented by authorized specialists. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched factory floor mats, every detail has been preserved to showroom standards. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a collector-grade example that drives as flawlessly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits an unblemished aesthetic and has been maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. Every detail, from the pristine interior appointments to the flawless mechanical performance, reflects a legacy of meticulous stewardship. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector seeking a vehicle of peerless quality and distinction.
